item.title: UK biotech secures £50M for AAV gene therapy platform
item.description: A UK-based biotech has closed a £50 million Series B to advance its adeno-associated virus (AAV) gene therapy platform targeting rare neurological diseases.

item.title: Pfizer reports phase 3 results for new migraine antibody
item.description: Pfizer announced positive phase 3 results for its CGRP monoclonal antibody for migraine prevention.

item.title: FDA approves first allogeneic CAR-NK cell therapy
item.description: The FDA has granted approval to the first off-the-shelf CAR-NK cell therapy for relapsed/refractory B-cell lymphoma, marking a milestone for allogeneic cell therapy.
